utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am doing research for a book , and I was wondering what someone might do if they left a baby on a city bus .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yes I do realize that would be a very stupid character .

emotion_cause.span: 4_that would be a very stupid character .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hi , here is the deal . We lost a carseat on a bus today . It is white plastic , with a handle , and it fits onto a stroller . Oh , and there was a baby in it .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: He wants to talk to you again .
